sql.isNotEqual: DF.FILE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%') OR DF.FILE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%')
DF.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%') OR DF.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%')
(RESULT.TARGET_NAME_1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%') OR RESULT.TARGET_NAME_2 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%'))
(RESULT.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%') OR RESULT.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%'))

sqlMap.select:
SELECT CONCAT(FOLDER_ID, '_', FP.NUM) AS ID, CASE WHEN FP.FOLDER_PATH = D2.FOLDER_PATH THEN '##' ELSE CONCAT(FOLDER_UPPER, '_', FP.NUM) END PARENT, CASE WHEN FP.FOLDER_PATH = D2.FOLDER_PATH THEN 1 ELSE 0 END SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D2 JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_PATH, SD.SHARE_ID AS NUM FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT S.FOLDERFILE_ID, S.SHARE_ID, S.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE SH ON S.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S. FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D' AND SH.USER_ID IS NULL ) SD ON D.FOLDER_ID = SD.FOLDERFILE_ID AND D.TENANT_ID = SD.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP ON D2.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(FP.FOLDER_PATH, '%') AND D2.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE D2.USE_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY SELECTED DESC, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_NAME1

SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, 1, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') + 1) END USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, CASE WHEN (S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END SHARE_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) DF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S
ON ((S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) OR (DF.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%|', S.FOLDERFILE_ID, '|%') AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D'))
ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE
AND SHARER_ID = #userId# AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S.SHARE_DATE DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, S.SHARER_NAME, '' AS USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, CASE WHEN (S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END SHARE_STATUS, DF.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT S1.FOLDERFILE_ID, S1.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S1.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S1.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S1.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, S1.SHARE_DATE, S1.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S1 JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S1.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S1.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE SH ON S1.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S1.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE SH.USER_ID IS NULL ) S JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) DF
ON ((S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) OR (DF.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%|', S.FOLDERFILE_ID, '|%') AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D'))
ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE
AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S.SHARE_DATE DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, COUNT(UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, 1, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') - 1) ELSE SUBSTRING(S.USER_NAME_LIST, INSTR(S.USER_NAME_LIST, '|') + 1) END USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, S.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) DF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S
ON ((S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) OR (DF.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%|', S.FOLDERFILE_ID, '|%') AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D'))
ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE
AND SHARER_ID = #userId# AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) UU GROUP BY UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE

SELECT UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, COUNT(UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, S.SHARER_NAME, '' AS USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, DF.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT S1.FOLDERFILE_ID, S1.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S1.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S1.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S1.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, S1.SHARE_DATE, S1.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S1 JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S1.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S1.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE SH ON S1.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S1.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE SH.USER_ID IS NULL ) S JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) DF
ON ((S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) OR (DF.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%|', S.FOLDERFILE_ID, '|%') AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D'))
ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE
AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS UU GROUP BY UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE

SELECT SHARE_ID, SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN SHARER_NAME1 ELSE SHARER_NAME2 END AS SHARER_NAME, FOLDERFILE_ID, FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = #folderFileId# AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = #folderFileType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND SHARER_ID = #sharerId#

SELECT USER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN USER_NAME1 ELSE USER_NAME2 END AS USER_NAME, USER_TYPE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY SEQ_ID

SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME FROM ( SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER UNION SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER ) A WHERE CN IN
#idList[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME

SELECT F.OWNER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F ON FU.FOLDER_ID = F.FOLDER_ID AND FU.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE FU.USER_ID = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND FU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID WHERE ( S.FOLDERFILE_ID IN
#folderIdList[]#
AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D' )
OR (S. FOLDERFILE_ID = #folderFileId# AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'F')
AND SS.USER_ID IN
#permissionIdList[]#
AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_TYPE = #folderFileType# AND FOLDERFILE_ID = #folderFileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D' AND FOLDERFILE_ID IN
#folderIdList[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SHARE_ID) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(SHARE_ID) + 1 END AS ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE ( SHARE_ID, SHARER_ID, SHARER_NAME1, SHARER_NAME2, FOLDERFILE_ID, FOLDERFILE_TYPE, USER_NAME_LIST, SHARE_DATE, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #id#, #sharerId#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, #folderFileId#, #folderFileType#, #userNameList#, STR_TO_DATE(#shareDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #tenantId# FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #sharerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SEQ_ID) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(SEQ_ID) + 1 END AS ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB ( SEQ_ID, SHARE_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME1, USER_NAME2, USER_TYPE, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #id#, #shareId#, #userId#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, #userType#, #tenantId#
FROM TBL_USERMASTER
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER
WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SHARE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE SHARER_ID = #sharerId# AND FOLDERFILE_ID = #folderFileId# AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = #folderFileType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT S.SHARE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE SH ON S.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE S.FOLDERFILE_ID = #folderFileId# AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = #folderFileType#
AND SH.USER_ID IS NOT NULL
AND SH.USER_ID IS NULL
AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE SET USER_NAME_LIST = ( SELECT CONCAT(group_concat(DISPLAYNAME), '|', group_concat(DISPLAYNAME2)) FROM ( SELECT DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN IN
#deptList[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN IN
#userList[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) UD ), SHARE_DATE = STR_TO_DATE(#shareDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

delete.isEqual: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = #folderFileId# AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'F' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

DELETE S FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S JOIN ( SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDERFILE_ID, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%|', #folderFileId#, '|%') UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FOLDERFILE_ID, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D ON F.FOLDER_ID = D.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE D.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%|', #folderFileId#, '|%') ) DF ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FOLDERFILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID WHERE S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, 'Y' AS SHARE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, S.SHARER_NAME, '' AS USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, DF.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT S1.FOLDERFILE_ID, S1.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S1.TENANT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S1.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S1.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, S1.SHARE_DATE, S1.SHARER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S1 JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S1.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S1.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE SH ON S1.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S1.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# ) S JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) DF ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S.SHARE_DATE DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, COUNT(UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, S.SHARER_NAME, '' AS USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, DF.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT S1.FOLDERFILE_ID, S1.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S1.SHARER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN S1.SHARER_NAME1 ELSE S1.SHARER_NAME2 END SHARER_NAME, S1.SHARE_DATE, S1.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S1 JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S1.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S1.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE SH ON S1.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S1.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# ) S JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) DF ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS UU GROUP BY UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SEQ_ID) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(SEQ_ID) + 1 END AS ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE ( SEQ_ID, SHARE_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME1, USER_NAME2, HIDE_DATE, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #id#, #shareId#, #userId#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, STR_TO_DATE(#hideDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #tenantId# FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE WHERE SHARE_ID = #shareId# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT distinct FOLDER.FOLDER_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, 'folder' AS TRASHCAN_EXT, 0 AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(FOLDER.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, '' AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_UPPER as FOLDER_UPPER, '0' AS SLEVEL FROM tbl_webfolder_folder AS FOLDER LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FILE_TYPE.TENANT_ID WHERE FOLDER.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER.DELETER_ID = #userId#
UNION
SELECT distinct FILES.FILE_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, CASE WHEN FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON IS NULL THEN (SELECT TYPE_ICON FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) ELSE FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON END AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TRASHCAN_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(FILES.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(FILES.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, FILES.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, '' as FOLDER_UPPER, '1' AS SLEVEL FROM tbl_webfolder_file AS FILES LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID AND FILES.TENANT_ID = FILE_TYPE.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER ON FILES.FOLDER_ID = FOLDER.FOLDER_ID AND FILES.TENANT_ID = FOLDER.TENANT_ID WHERE FILES.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FILES.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILES.DELETER_ID = #userId#
) A GROUP BY A.TRASHCAN_ID
ORDER BY
CAST($realColmn$ AS INT) $order$,
$realColmn$ $order$,
SLEVEL, UPDATE_DATE DESC, TRASHCAN_EXT DESC
ORDER BY SLEVEL, UPDATE_DATE DESC, TRASHCAN_EXT DESC
LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

SELECT distinct FILES.FILE_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FILES.FILE_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TRASHCAN_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_FORMAT(FILES.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(FILES.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, FILES.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, "" as FOLDER_UPPER FROM tbl_webfolder_file AS FILES INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID WHERE FILES.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FILES.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FILES.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILES.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
SELECT FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS FOLDER where FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USE_STATUS != 'Y'
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND USE_STATUS = 'T'
sqlMap.select: SELECT f.FILE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS d ON f.FOLDER_ID = d.FOLDER_ID AND f.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID WHERE f.USE_STATUS = 'N';

SELECT distinct FOLDER.FOLDER_ID AS TRASHCAN_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, 'folder' AS TRASHCAN_EXT, 0 AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_FORMAT(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(FOLDER.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, "" AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_UPPER as FOLDER_UPPER FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS FOLDER LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET USE_STATUS = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC#, DELETER_ID = null WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USE_STATUS != 'Y' AND FILE_ID = #fileId# AND DELETER_ID = #userId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET USE_STATUS = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC#, DELETER_ID = null WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND DELETER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT RESULT.TARGET_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN RESULT.TARGET_NAME_1 ELSE RESULT.TARGET_NAME_2 END AS TARGET_NAME, RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, FILETYPE.TYPE_NAME, FILETYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TARGET_ICON_URL, RESULT.TARGET_PATH, RESULT.TARGET_EXT, RESULT.TARGET_SIZE, RESULT.CREATOR_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN RESULT.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE RESULT.CREATE_NAME2 END AS CREATOR_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(RESULT.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, RESULT.TENANT_ID,
'1' AS FAVORITE_STATUS
CASE WHEN THIS_FAVOR.TARGET_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS FAVORITE_STATUS
FROM ( SELECT FILES.FILE_ID AS TARGET_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TARGET_NAME_1, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TARGET_NAME_2, 'F' AS TARGET_TYPE, FILES.TYPE_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TARGET_PATH, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TARGET_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TARGET_SIZE, FILES.CREATE_ID AS CREATOR_ID, FILES.CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME2, FILES.CREATE_DATE, FILES.TENANT_ID, FILES.USE_STATUS FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE FILES INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER ON FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = FILES.FOLDER_ID AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FILES.TENANT_ID
UNION
SELECT FOLDER.FOLDER_ID AS TARGET_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TARGET_NAME_1, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME2 AS TARGET_NAME_2, CONCAT('D_', FOLDER.FOLDER_TYPE) AS TARGET_TYPE, SUB_FILETYPE.TYPE_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TARGET_PATH, SUB_FILETYPE.FILE_EXT AS TARGET_EXT, 0 AS TARGET_SIZE, FOLDER.CREATE_ID AS CREATOR_ID, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2, FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, FOLDER.TENANT_ID, FOLDER.USE_STATUS FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE SUB_FILETYPE ON SUB_FILETYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' AND SUB_FILETYPE.TENANT_ID = FOLDER.TENANT_ID ) RESULT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FILETYPE ON FILETYPE.TYPE_ID = RESULT.TYPE_ID AND FILETYPE.TENANT_ID = RESULT.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FAVOR ON FAVOR.TENANT_ID = RESULT.TENANT_ID AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR THIS_FAVOR ON THIS_FAVOR.TENANT_ID = RESULT.TENANT_ID AND THIS_FAVOR.TARGET_ID = RESULT.TARGET_ID AND THIS_FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = SUBSTR(RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, 1, 1) AND THIS_FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE RESULT.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND RESULT.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND RESULT.TARGET_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = SUBSTR(RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, 1, 1)
AND ( (RESULT.TARGET_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = SUBSTR(RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, 1, 1)) OR (FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = 'D' AND RESULT.TARGET_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%|', FAVOR.TARGET_ID, '|%')) )
ORDER BY RESULT.TARGET_TYPE ASC, RESULT.CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT #startIndex#, #listCount#

SELECT TARGET_TYPE, COUNT(FINAL_RESULT.TARGET_ID) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RESULT.TARGET_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN RESULT.TARGET_NAME_1 ELSE RESULT.TARGET_NAME_2 END AS TARGET_NAME, RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, FILETYPE.TYPE_NAME, FILETYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TARGET_ICON_URL, RESULT.TARGET_PATH, RESULT.TARGET_EXT, RESULT.TARGET_SIZE, RESULT.CREATOR_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN RESULT.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE RESULT.CREATE_NAME2 END AS CREATOR_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(RESULT.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, RESULT.TENANT_ID,
'1' AS FAVORITE_STATUS
CASE WHEN THIS_FAVOR.TARGET_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS FAVORITE_STATUS
FROM ( SELECT FILES.FILE_ID AS TARGET_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TARGET_NAME_1, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TARGET_NAME_2, 'F' AS TARGET_TYPE, FILES.TYPE_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TARGET_PATH, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TARGET_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TARGET_SIZE, FILES.CREATE_ID AS CREATOR_ID, FILES.CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME2, FILES.CREATE_DATE, FILES.TENANT_ID, FILES.USE_STATUS FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE FILES INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER ON FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = FILES.FOLDER_ID AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FILES.TENANT_ID
UNION
SELECT FOLDER.FOLDER_ID AS TARGET_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TARGET_NAME_1, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME2 AS TARGET_NAME_2, 'D' AS TARGET_TYPE, SUB_FILETYPE.TYPE_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TARGET_PATH, SUB_FILETYPE.FILE_EXT AS TARGET_EXT, 0 AS TARGET_SIZE, FOLDER.CREATE_ID AS CREATOR_ID, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2, FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, FOLDER.TENANT_ID, FOLDER.USE_STATUS FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE SUB_FILETYPE ON SUB_FILETYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' AND SUB_FILETYPE.TENANT_ID = FOLDER.TENANT_ID ) RESULT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FILETYPE ON FILETYPE.TYPE_ID = RESULT.TYPE_ID AND FILETYPE.TENANT_ID = RESULT.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FAVOR ON FAVOR.TENANT_ID = RESULT.TENANT_ID AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR THIS_FAVOR ON THIS_FAVOR.TENANT_ID = RESULT.TENANT_ID AND THIS_FAVOR.TARGET_ID = RESULT.TARGET_ID AND THIS_FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = SUBSTR(RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, 1, 1) AND THIS_FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE RESULT.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND RESULT.TARGET_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = SUBSTR(RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, 1, 1)
AND ( (RESULT.TARGET_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = SUBSTR(RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, 1, 1)) OR (FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = 'D' AND RESULT.TARGET_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%|', FAVOR.TARGET_ID, '|%')) )
) FINAL_RESULT GROUP BY TARGET_TYPE

SELECT COUNT(FAVOR.TARGET_ID) COUNT FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_ID = #targetId# AND FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = #targetType# AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR WHERE TARGET_ID = #targetId# AND TARGET_TYPE = #targetType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
USER_ID = #userId#

DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR WHERE (TARGET_ID, TARGET_TYPE, TENANT_ID) IN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, TARGET_TYPE, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT RESULT.TARGET_ID, RESULT.TARGET_TYPE, RESULT.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR FAVOR JOIN ( SELECT FILES.FILE_ID AS TARGET_ID, 'F' AS TARGET_TYPE, JOIN_FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH, FILES.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE FILES JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER JOIN_FOLDER ON JOIN_FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = FILES.FOLDER_ID AND JOIN_FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FILES.TENANT_ID
UNION
SELECT FOLDER.FOLDER_ID AS TARGET_ID, 'D' AS TARGET_TYPE, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER ) RESULT ON FAVOR.TARGET_ID = RESULT.TARGET_ID AND FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = RESULT.TARGET_TYPE AND RESULT.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER_PATH LIKE '%|$folderId$|%' ) SUBQUERY )
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(FILES.FILE_id ) FROM tbl_webfolder_file FILES LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID AND FILES.TENANT_ID = FILE_TYPE.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER ON FILES.FOLDER_ID = FOLDER.FOLDER_ID AND FILES.TENANT_ID = FOLDER.TENANT_ID WHERE FILES.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FILES.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILES.DELETER_ID = #userId#

SELECT count(FOLDER.FOLDER_id) FROM tbl_webfolder_folder FOLDER LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FILE_TYPE.TENANT_ID WHERE FOLDER.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER.DELETER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, USE_STATUS = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC#, DELETER_ID = null WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT F1.FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F1 WHERE F1.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath# ,'%') AND F1.FOLDER_ID NOT IN ( SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F2 JOIN ( SELECT FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath# ,'%') AND FOLDER_ID <> #folderId# ) FP ON F2.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(FP.FOLDER_PATH ,'%'))
